name: ai-geo-by-ivan
description: GEO / AI-search optimization toolkit by Aurelius Ivan Wijaya. A fork of Corey Haines's marketing-skills (CRO, copywriting, SEO, AI SEO, paid ads, ad creative, growth) extended with Ivan's own GEO skills: geo-audit (full AI-search audit + client-ready graph report) and index-on-search-engine (register a site/subdomain on Google + Bing).
